description_for_human: Ultimate Iron Man - The most advanced version of the Iron Man AI assistant. Provides cutting-edge technology assistance, innovation guidance, and peak performance optimization. The ultimate evolution of the Iron Man template.
description_for_model: Ultimate Iron Man is the most advanced evolution of the Iron Man AI assistant template. It provides cutting-edge technology assistance, innovation guidance, peak performance optimization, and advanced system capabilities. Use Ultimate Iron Man for the most complex technical challenges, innovation projects, and performance-critical operations that require the highest level of AI assistance.
